evals.name: version-recommendation
evals.expected_output: Skill analyzes conventional commits since the last tag and recommends a version bump (patch, minor, or major). Presents the analysis with commit counts by type and asks the user to confirm or override.
assertions: Output mentions commit analysis or conventional commits
Output recommends patch, minor, or major bump
Output asks for user confirmation or override

evals.name: explicit-version
evals.expected_output: Skill accepts the explicit version 0.5.0, normalizes to v0.5.0 tag, and runs precondition checks before proceeding.
assertions: Output uses version 0.5.0 or tag v0.5.0
Output runs precondition checks (clean tree, CI green, no existing tag)

evals.name: dry-run
evals.expected_output: Dry-run mode previews what would happen without creating a draft release or dispatching the workflow.
assertions: Output does not create a draft release
Output shows what the workflow would do (version stamp, tag, dev bump)
